title: Wotson
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Wotson |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Peace Brigade]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You and Ven grab seats where you can keep an eye on me. But stay put. Don't do anything unless I give a sign.''"
"''Got it.|Reck Desh and Wotson|}} '''Wotson''' was a large [[Gender/Legends|male]] in the [[Peace Brigade]], a band of [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] citizens that cooperated with [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] invaders called the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' alongside [[Ven (Peace Brigade)|Ven]], Wotson guarded [[Reck Desh]], the leader of the Brigade, when he traveled to [[Kuat City]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]]. There, the trio visited a diner called the [[Nebula Orchid]] to meet an informant, secretly [[Viqi Shesh]]. Wotson and Ven sat at a nearby table while Shesh told Desh of a captured [[Elan|Yuuzhan Vong priestess]]. Once the meeting was over, the trio pursued the informant into the streets, but lost sight of the person. ==Behind the scenes== Wotson briefly appeared in ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'', a [[2000]] novel written by [[James Luceno]] as the fourth volume in the ''[[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order]]'' series. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Peace Brigaders]]
